title: Ice World
description:
Discord: 

About the game:A blizzard brought a long winter lasting decades, Humanity on the brink of extinction. Survivors had to face ferocious beasts, and the survivors struggled to survive in this frozen world. Take your husky puppy to hunt, mine ice and snow to build a base, and survive in the cold apocalypse.

Game Features• You can play alone or create your own server and team up with friends.

• Free construction system, You can mine ice and snow to build igloos and ice castles, buildings

• Build greenhouses to grow various vegetables and trees.

• Animal taming and riding, pets, you can tame pet dogs, wolves, tigers, polar bears, Yeti, ride wolves, ride horses, ride polar bears, tigers

• Fishing and hunting

• High-quality male and female characters can be selected， a variety of high-quality animal models and animations

• Dynamic day and night cycle system, blizzard weather and clear weather change, you can see the gorgeous aurora at night

• Switching between third-person and first-person perspectives
description_short: A blizzard brought a long winter, Humanity on the brink of extinction. you had to face ferocious beasts, mine ice and snow to build a base, and survive in the cold apocalypse.
